functions.functionContentWithoutFormatting: { uint32_t gpioA = 0xFFFFFFFFU; uint32_t gpioB = 0xFFFFFFFFU; uint32_t gpioC = 0xFFFFFFFFU; uint32_t gpioD = 0xFFFFFFFFU; uint32_t gpioF = 0xFFFFFFFFU; uint32_t gpioG = 0xFFFFFFFFU; uint32_t gpioH = 0xFFFFFFFFU; // // Read Pin Count // uint32_t pinCount = \ (HWREG(DEVCFG_BASE + SYSCTL_O_PARTIDL) & SYSCTL_PARTIDL_PIN_COUNT_M) >> SYSCTL_PARTIDL_PIN_COUNT_S; // // Get pull up enable settings for the pin count // switch(pinCount) { case PIN_COUNT_100: gpioA = F29H85x_100_PIN_QFP_GPA; gpioB = F29H85x_100_PIN_QFP_GPB; gpioC = F29H85x_100_PIN_QFP_GPC; gpioD = F29H85x_100_PIN_QFP_GPD; gpioF = F29H85x_100_PIN_QFP_GPF; gpioG = F29H85x_100_PIN_QFP_GPG; gpioH = F29H85x_100_PIN_QFP_GPH; break; case PIN_COUNT_144: gpioA = F29H85x_144_PIN_QFP_GPA; gpioB = F29H85x_144_PIN_QFP_GPB; gpioC = F29H85x_144_PIN_QFP_GPC; gpioD = F29H85x_144_PIN_QFP_GPD; gpioF = F29H85x_144_PIN_QFP_GPF; gpioG = F29H85x_144_PIN_QFP_GPG; gpioH = F29H85x_144_PIN_QFP_GPH; break; case PIN_COUNT_176: gpioA = F29H85x_176_PIN_QFP_GPA; gpioB = F29H85x_176_PIN_QFP_GPB; gpioC = F29H85x_176_PIN_QFP_GPC; gpioD = F29H85x_176_PIN_QFP_GPD; gpioF = F29H85x_176_PIN_QFP_GPF; gpioG = F29H85x_176_PIN_QFP_GPG; gpioH = F29H85x_176_PIN_QFP_GPH; break; default: case PIN_COUNT_256: gpioA = F29H85x_256_PIN_BGA_GPA; gpioB = F29H85x_256_PIN_BGA_GPB; gpioC = F29H85x_256_PIN_BGA_GPC; gpioD = F29H85x_256_PIN_BGA_GPD; gpioF = F29H85x_256_PIN_BGA_GPF; gpioG = F29H85x_256_PIN_BGA_GPG; gpioH = F29H85x_256_PIN_BGA_GPH; break; } // // Configure the pull up enable settings // HWREG(GPIOCTRL_BASE + GPIO_O_GPAPUD) = gpioA; HWREG(GPIOCTRL_BASE + GPIO_O_GPBPUD) = gpioB; HWREG(GPIOCTRL_BASE + GPIO_O_GPCPUD) = gpioC; HWREG(GPIOCTRL_BASE + GPIO_O_GPDPUD) = gpioD; HWREG(GPIOCTRL_BASE + GPIO_O_GPFPUD) = gpioF; HWREG(GPIOCTRL_BASE + GPIO_O_GPGPUD) = gpioG; HWREG(GPIOCTRL_BASE + GPIO_O_GPHPUD) = gpioH; }
